description: The CylinderMesh component is used to provide a mesh to render. The mesh that it provides is a procedural 3D cylinder with a number of sides and a radius.

fields.Height: The height of the cylinder in meters in local space.
fields.Radius: The radius of the cylinder in meters in local space.
fields.Sides: How many sides the cylinder should have around it's midsection.
fields.Caps: Whether the cylinder should be a tube or not.
fields.UVScale: The inverse of the size the material should appear on the surface as.

usage: Attach to a slot, and assign to a Mesh Renderer to see what it looks like. Don't forget to use a Material.
